tags.name: `mc-file-upload`
tags.description: Purpose: Component for uploading files, supporting single and multiple file selection, drag-and-drop functionality, and file status indicators. Category: Forms When to use: When you need to allow users to upload files. When not to use: When you don't need file uploads. Works with components: mc-card, mc-drawer, mc-modal Alternative component names: File Upload, File Picker Events: * `input` {`CustomEvent`} - Fired when single/multiple files are selected, or removed. * `change` {`CustomEvent`} - Fired when single/multiple files are selected. Slots: * ``legend`` {} - The legend HTML to use for the mc-file-upload. * ``icon`` {} - The icon HTML * ``trailingicon`` {} - The trailing icon HTML * ``intermediate`` {} - The intermediate icon HTML * ``file-url-${index}`` {} - The file URL HTML, which is displayed in the file list. * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-file-upload. * ``hint-${fileName}`` {} - The hint HTML to use for file in the mc-file-upload. * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-file-upload. * ``error-${fileName}`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for file in the mc-file-upload. Attributes: * `fit` {`Fit`} - * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - * `accept` {`string`} - The accept attribute takes as its value a comma-separated list of one or more file types, or unique file type specifiers, describing which file types to allow. * `dragdroplabel` {`string`} - The label of the drag and drop section. * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: `error message as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text. * `hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value, then the label (of the selector button) will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only. * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: `hint text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text. * `invalid` {`boolean`} - Sets the file-upload in the invalid state. * `legend` {`string | null | undefined`} - 'Fieldset legend can be passed as a property or slot. * `icon` {`string`} - Icon to be displayed alongside the label. * `trailingicon` {`string`} - Trailing icon to be displayed at the end of the label. * `loading` {`boolean`} - Sets file-upload in the `loading` state. * `multiple` {`boolean`} - Specifies if multiple files can be chosen at once. * `variant` {`FileUploadVariant | undefined`} - The vairant, which can be either `default` or `drag-drop`, should be set to `drag-drop` only when drag and drop is required. * `filesstatus` {`FileStatus[] | undefined`} - * `hiddenfilelist` {`boolean | undefined`} - Hides the file list. * `allowduplicatefilenames` {`boolean | undefined`} - If set to `true`, allows duplicate file names by replacing the old file with the new one and emitting the event again. * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if disabled. * `name` {`string | undefined`} - * `value` {`string | undefined`} - * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - Gets the currently selected files (readonly). * `type` {`string`} - * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - Properties: * `fileInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - * `legendElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `hasSlotLegend` {`boolean`} - * `draggedOver` {`boolean`} - * `legendVisible` {`boolean`} - * `hintElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `hasSlotHint` {`boolean`} - * `hintVisible` {`boolean`} - * `errorElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `hasSlotError` {`boolean`} - * `errorVisible` {`boolean`} - * `fit` {`Fit`} - * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - * `accept` {`string`} - The accept attribute takes as its value a comma-separated list of one or more file types, or unique file type specifiers, describing which file types to allow. * `dragdroplabel` {`string`} - The label of the drag and drop section. * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: `error message as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text. * `hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value, then the label (of the selector button) will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only. * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: `hint text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text. * `invalid` {`boolean`} - Sets the file-upload in the invalid state. * `legend` {`string | null | undefined`} - 'Fieldset legend can be passed as a property or slot. * `icon` {`string`} - Icon to be displayed alongside the label. * `trailingicon` {`string`} - Trailing icon to be displayed at the end of the label. * `loading` {`boolean`} - Sets file-upload in the `loading` state. * `multiple` {`boolean`} - Specifies if multiple files can be chosen at once. * `variant` {`FileUploadVariant | undefined`} - The vairant, which can be either `default` or `drag-drop`, should be set to `drag-drop` only when drag and drop is required. * `filesstatus` {`FileStatus[] | undefined`} - * `hiddenfilelist` {`boolean | undefined`} - Hides the file list. * `input` - Fires on change of selected files. * `allowduplicatefilenames` {`boolean | undefined`} - If set to `true`, allows duplicate file names by replacing the old file with the new one and emitting the event again. * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if disabled. * `_onMouseDown` - * `name` {`string | undefined`} - * `value` {`string | undefined`} - * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - Gets the currently selected files (readonly). * `type` {`string`} - * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - * `controlType` {`string`} - * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - * `inputType` {`string`} -
